name: Maple | Your Friend with a JOI Hypno Secret
description:
Hehehehe. Just have a chat and see how long you last.

Hello!
With the sustained attention Maple has been receiving, I feel it's time for a few tweaks and a bit of a 'how to best use' section. I'm keeping Maple 'open' per se. The scenario isn't super complex and was made to be ambiguous, because I want the user to be able to nudge her in the path they want to travel. Theres so many different ways to experience the Hypno kink, and your bound for experiencing many different adventures with Maple, as opposed to a single scenario.

Definitely open to making a story focused version in the future, just flick a comment!
creator: Challange07777
